description_long: This is a stylized, low-poly military tank with a green camouflage pattern covering its entire exterior. The vehicle features a large, octagonal turret mounted centrally on the hull, with a prominent, cylindrical main cannon extending forward. The hull is broad and angular, with sloped armor surfaces and a flat top, giving it a robust and imposing appearance. The tank is equipped with wide, black tracks on either side, each track consisting of several large, polygonal segments. There are no visible hatches, windows, or additional weapon mounts aside from the main cannon. The overall design is simple and geometric, emphasizing functionality and armored protection.
description: A stylized green camouflage tank with a large central turret, prominent main cannon, and wide black tracks on both sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide tracks, sloped armor, and the main turret with cannon facing left.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the central turret, the full length of the cannon, and the camouflage pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tracks, the rear hull, and the turret with the cannon extending to the right.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear armor, the width of the hull, and the tracks on both sides.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the central turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with sloped surfaces; thickness appears substantial but exact measurement is not visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland camouflage pattern with irregular green and dark green patches.
